name: CESCOM – Apprentice – 200 Posts
qualification: B.A, BCA, B.B.A, B.Com, B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma

basic_details.job_title: CESCOM Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 200 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Chamundeshwari Electricity Supply Corporation (CESCOM) has released 200 Apprentice vacancies. Eligible candidates with B.A, BCA, B.B.A, B.Com, B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma can apply online from 08-05-2026 to 29-05-2026 at cescmysore.karnataka.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Chamundeshwari Electricity Supply Corporation Limited (CESC), Mysore

qualification.education_qualification: B.A, BCA, B.B.A, B.Com, B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma

how_to_apply: Candidates must register/enroll on the National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS) Portal and apply against CESC vacancies.
